title: Principal Radiologist at Becton Dickinson India

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Becton Dickinson India
jsonLd.description:
Becton Dickinson India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Becton Dickinson India:
Becton Dickinson India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Becton Dickinson India!
